stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The schematic global views show the areas of easterly (red) and westerly (blue) winds in the upper troposphere. What is depicted in figure 3?

options.a: Flow pattern in July, ITCZ moves further north
options.b: Flow pattern in January, ITCZ moves further south
options.c: Flow pattern in July, ITCZ moves further south
options.d: Flow pattern in January, ITCZ moves further north
